---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Peaky Peek
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem you're facing or the gap you've identified. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see. How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds or alternative approaches? Why don't they fully solve the problem?

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful. Who benefits and how?

## Framework / Integration Scope

Does this feature relate to a specific framework or component?

- [ ] Core SDK (`peaky-peek`)
- [ ] Server / API (`peaky-peek-server`)
- [ ] LangChain adapter
- [ ] LangGraph adapter
- [ ] OpenAI adapter
- [ ] UI / Frontend
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Storage backend
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues that might help clarify the request.
